pageContext.name: Tengen Uzui
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Aniplex+ present the Tengen Uzui Collectible Figure from the action-packed TV series Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba!  Featuring a flashy fighting scene of the Sound Hashira in the Entertainment District, this figure includes his iconic dual Nichirin swords with an elaborate handle, sword guard, blade, and chains connecting the two swords recreated with such detail that it gives this figure a larger than life feel. Along with a facial expression that shows his lady-killer smile, the figure comes with two choices of hair arrangements with customizable bangs. Tengen Uzui's well-trained body is meticulously recreated to highlight his well-trained body including his toned muscles and bulging veins.  Add this flashy figure to your Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba collection today!
